column9: Defaulting T0540 values so the rule doesn't apply. Use 1082 field

Rule:Where T1082.typ_cd = OTHR and T1082.relation_cd = 'CHLD' move D.
Where T1082.typ_cd = OTHR and T1082.relation_cd = 'FATH' move P.
Where T1082.typ_cd = OTHR and T1082.relation_cd = 'GUAR' move G.
Where T1082.typ_cd = AP and T1082.relation_cd = 'FATH' move A
Where T1082_typ_cd = OTHR and T1082_relation_cd = 'BTEX' move P.
Where an unknown NCP exists (MCI number of 999995) and a valid NCP exists, do NOT convert the unknown NCP.

Rule:Default  to A for NCPs and CPs
Where T1082_typ_cd = OTHR and T1082.relation_cd = BTEX, move I.
Where T1082_typ_cd = OTHR and T1082.relation_cd = FATH, move I.

Rule:This field is populated only for DPs.
Where T1082.typ_cd =  CLI and T1082.relation_cd = MOTH move MTR
Where T1082.typ_cd =  CLI  and T1082.relation_cd = FATH move FTR
Where T1082.typ_cd =  CLI  and T1082.relation_cd = GPAR and sex if female,  move GRM
Where T1082.typ_cd =  CLI  and T1082.relation_cd = GPAR and sex if male,  move GRF
If none of the above, move NOT

Rule:This field is populated only for DPs.
Where T1082.typ_cd =  AP and T1082.relation_cd = MOTH move MTR
Where T1082.typ_cd =  AP  and T1082.relation_cd = FATH move FTR
If T1082.typ_CD = AP and T1082.relation_cd not equal MOTH or FATH, check the CP:
Where T1082.typ_cd = CLI and T1082.relation_cd = MOTH move FTR
Where T1082.typ_cd = CLI  and T1082.relation_cd = FATH move MTR
If neither of the above is true, move spaces.

Rule:If the member relationship code is set to C (CP) move Y
else move N

Rule:Default to N unless:
If T1044.UNWORK_RSN_CD in ('WPFA','UPFA')  
move 'Y' for all  DPs,  CP, and NCP.

Rule:If the FAMILYVIOLENCE_INDC has been set to Y,
move T1044.UNWORK_RSN_EFF_DT
else move low date.

Rule:Where FAMILYVIOLENCE_INDC = N, move DE (DEFAULT- FAMILY VIOLENCE NOT AN ISSUE)
else
Fetch the  T1049 using the case number and if field PFA_IND is set to Y, move FA (PFA Order Entered)
else move CF (Member  Requests Family Violence Protection)

Rule:Where T1082_typ_cd = OTHR and T1082.relation_cd = BTEX, move X.
LOV  Member status reason
REFM  GENR/ MSTR
